description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a boxy, geometric silhouette and a deep, rich brown color. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be well-padded and slightly indented for comfort. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a uniform and contemporary appearance. The upholstery has a smooth, slightly glossy finish, suggesting a leather or high-quality synthetic material. The legs are short, block-like, and barely visible, positioned at the corners for stability. Overall, the sofa exudes a minimalist, urban style suitable for public spaces or modern outdoor environments.
description: A modern, boxy three-seater sofa in rich brown with smooth, glossy upholstery, straight armrests, and three individual seat and back cushions.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's straight, wide armrest and the profile of the three back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all three seat and back cushions, the full width of the sofa, and both armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the armrest and cushion profile from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous, unadorned back panel and the tops of the three back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all uniform in size and attached, arranged in a single row.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, padded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of wood or plastic, with a recessed appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three attached, uniform cushions, forming a continuous, segmented structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown color with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
